data.content: Added displayCommandLabel() in agent-identity.ts to normalize CLI command names (codex-cli→Codex, claude→Claude, etc). Updated toActiveAgentInfo in beats/page.tsx to use it for the agentName column. Added tests for codex-cli with model gpt-5.4 and gpt-5.4-codex. All 1950 tests pass, typecheck clean, pushed to main as 366e8c12.
